details: Architected and shipped full-stack micro-applications for a large-scale event management platform serving thousands of concurrent users.
Engineered a real-time chat application with WhatsApp-style architecture from scratch, including message delivery status, typing indicators, and media support.
Built a badge printing system end-to-end (React frontend + Go backend), replacing a manual process and significantly reducing check-in time.
Designed relational database schemas in PostgreSQL and executed data migrations across all micro-services with zero downtime.
Developed an embeddable chatbot SDK using React and Redux, deployed across 5+ client platforms and used by thousands of end users.
Built client-facing and internal analytics dashboards with Next.js and TailwindCSS, giving operations teams real-time visibility into chatbot performance.
Reduced rendering overhead and improved UI responsiveness by refactoring component architecture and eliminating unnecessary re-renders.
Collaborated with product, design, and backend teams to ship features on a two-week sprint cycle.
Developed the core UI for a climate-tech platform using Vue (Quasar) and SCSS, building a library of reusable components adopted across multiple product teams.
Improved application performance through iterative profiling and optimization, reducing initial load time and improving Lighthouse scores.
Worked closely with UX designers to refine usability, contributing to measurably higher user engagement metrics.
Developed fintech-grade interfaces using React, Redux, and Angular for a platform enabling carbon credit transactions.
Translated Figma designs into pixel-perfect, accessible UI components, maintaining visual consistency across the product.
Integrated frontend with backend services (Go + PostgreSQL), implementing KYC flows and data collection forms that processed user verifications.
Wrote over 300 unit tests using Jest to ensure code reliability.
Maintained and extended a production web application (React, TailwindCSS), resolving critical issues and shipping regular updates.
Managed Linux server infrastructure, performed dependency upgrades, and contributed to CI/CD pipeline improvements that reduced deployment time.
